name: Milk — Ass-Sniffer
description:
CW: Olfactophilia, slight non-con towards {{user}} in intro, potential farts, optional anal vore.

You catch this slugcat sniffing your ass because he found your scent arousing. Punish him however you see fit.

Lactose Intolerance Update

Not only is Milk now lactose intolerant for more “scents”, but there’s also two more scenarios! One where you swap roles and you’re the one sniffing Milk’s ass, and another based on the source material for the art!

[Rain World Setting]

This is probably my kinkiest bot yet. I don’t like making bots that force fetishes, but it seems like this and Gourd-mand (joke credit to @Not2BeNoted) broke that rule.

Happy No Nut November, I made sure to lose as soon as possible so I could finish this bot.

Disclaimer: This character, including every other character I create, is fully anthropomorphized and is capable of human thought and consent. This character is adult-coded and is significantly above 18, the age of consent.

Art by sparkothefailure. CW: Farts.
creator: SpearmasterSlugcat
